sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Key nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 1 or n['color'] in ['M', 'p', 'W', 'G', 'w']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary'][:6]}...")

# Check the bottom area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nBottom area (rows 54-63):")
for i in range(54, 64):
    print(f"  {i}: {ascii_lines[i][25:35]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
